title: tocoyena havanensis
intro: Tocoyena havanensis, also known as the Cuban Tocoyena or Yellow Trumpetbush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is native to the Caribbean and is known for its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Tocoyena havanensis have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, which can help to alleviate various health issues such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are commonly used to treat respiratory problems, wounds, and other health conditions.
